question: Are discount prescription programs like GoodRx too good to be true or potentially harmful?
topic: Addresses both unfounded suspicion and over-reliance on prescription discount programs

discovery_sources.text: TrumpRx offers 43 brand name drugs at discounted prices through manufacturer coupons and GoodRx integration - verify scope and accuracy of drug list
discovery_sources.origin: Unbiased Science: Pharmacists' Role In Public Health: Side Effects May Include Hope

discovery_sources.text: TrumpRx prices are often similar to or higher than existing discount services like GoodRx and SingleCare - verify comparative pricing accuracy
discovery_sources.origin: Unbiased Science: Pharmacists' Role In Public Health: Side Effects May Include Hope

discovery_sources.text: GoodRx makes money by negotiating with pharmacy benefit managers and pocketing part of the savings - verify business model accuracy
